targetIdentity.targetName: NRA B-1 / TQ-6 25-Foot Slow Fire Pistol

uteRouting.rulesSource: Pistoleer NRA handgun target listing confirms B-1/TQ-6 identity, distance, sheet size, and black center size; complete ring geometry remains unconfirmed.

officialRules: B-1 / TQ-6 is identified as a 25-foot Slow Fire Pistol target.
Ring-based scoring is expected for bullseye slow-fire pistol targets.
Highest scoring ring touched should determine shot value once bullet-hole boundary evidence is authoritative.
courseOfFire: Shot count and match course are intentionally not activated until official scoring authority is confirmed.
instructionAuthority.intendedUse: Indoor or reduced-distance slow-fire pistol bullseye practice and competition scoring.
passFailOrScoringRules: Each shot receives a ring value once official ring geometry is confirmed.
X-ring, if supported by authoritative geometry, counts as 10 points plus X-count.
Line-touch scoring requires authoritative bullet-hole boundary evidence; otherwise close calls must be flagged for review.

aimPointRules: Aim at the center of the single bull.
scoringZones: Conceptual bullseye rings are known; exact official ring diameters and X-ring dimensions remain UNKNOWN / REQUIRES OFFICIAL SOURCE.

evidenceRequirements.requiredImpactCount: match/practice dependent; do not infer until course authority is confirmed
minimumConfidenceRequirements: Official ring geometry required before authoritative ring score.
Uploaded target must be calibrated to the B-1/TQ-6 sheet or bull geometry.
Line-touch scoring requires authoritative bullet-hole boundary evidence or review flagging.

unknowns.neededSource: Authoritative NRA rulebook, NRA target specification, or approved target manufacturer source listing all B-1/TQ-6 ring and X-ring diameters.
Official NRA Precision Pistol course-of-fire authority for B-1/TQ-6 use.
SCZN3 evidence model for bullet diameter, hole edge detection, or manual review before awarding line-touch higher value.

sourceAudit.notes: Pistoleer lists TQ-6 as B-1 Slow Fire under 25 Foot Slow Fire Pistol, 6 x 7 inch tagboard target, with 1-9/16 inch black center.
